author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #15 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC! 

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel  

This week we are talking about COPA, Star Atlas Q3, SCREAM, and more! Lots of content to get you started on this epic new phase of our project!
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/981267697423749181
